gate:adr: ADR 0002 records the external browser certification adapter and its unchanged authority boundaries
gate:architecture: Architecture evidence and policy tests prove Playwright uses only public web/API surfaces and adds no runtime owner
gate:release-certification: Pinned static, two-pass hermetic Compose, and clean Journey 11 gates retain a hashed machine manifest
gate:security-privacy: Normal server sessions, direct 403 assertions, isolated state, and synthetic-only retained media are certified
risk:auditability: Captured immutable v1 and distinct v2 hashes are matched to final read-only audit trails with retained trace and screenshots
risk:human-authority: Five distinct personas use normal login/logout and only their server-authorized lifecycle actions

gate:adr: ADR 0002 records the no-new-ADR operations adapter rationale and unchanged authority boundaries
gate:architecture: Boundary evidence and policy tests prove commands compose existing units without adding a runtime owner
gate:release-certification: Hosted static, two-pass hermetic Compose, headless Journey 11, and retained hashes certify the operator contract
gate:security-privacy: The runbook limits credentials and state to isolated synthetic POC use and documents evidence retention
risk:auditability: Reset fingerprints, service health, browser artifacts, command results, and machine manifests are retained
risk:configuration-drift: One script owns Make/npm command delegation and tests keep migration, reset, and browser aliases aligned

SUB-55.certificationRationale: Terminal POC certification proves the complete Journey 11 lifecycle, visible persona permissions, server-side denials without mutation, deterministic replay, immutable versions, and retained release artifacts from isolated state.

gate:adr: ADR 0002 records the terminal external-certification adapter and no-new-runtime-decision rationale
gate:architecture: Boundary fitness tests and the public-surface Playwright run prove one modular monolith with no client authority or new owner
gate:security-privacy: Synthetic-only fixtures, normal revocable sessions, direct 403 assertions, zero-mutation tests, and isolated retained evidence cover the POC threat boundary
gate:ai-governance: The real local adapter produces reviewed draft fields only; deterministic rules and canonical humans own every downstream decision
gate:config-governance: Visible UI execution and lifecycle tests prove draft, immutable test evidence, human approval, and prospective activation before invoice work
gate:release-certification: Hosted static and two-pass Compose gates plus clean headless and paced headed Journey 11 retain machine results, video, trace, screenshots, logs, state, and hashes
risk:auditability: The Auditor reconstructs exact actors, versions, relations, snapshots, validation/package manifests, and both archive hashes while v1 remains unchanged
risk:human-authority: All five personas display bounded permissions and use distinct normal sessions; only assigned humans perform configuration, attestation, submission, return, and approval
risk:configuration-drift: Pinned tools, exact contracts, deterministic reset fingerprints, validation replay, and byte-identical package replay constrain environment and configuration drift
risk:ai-authority: Playwright observes human correction of the AI draft before deterministic validation and proves no AI/system authority action occurs

SUB-80.certificationRationale: The generalized delivery skill must preserve scoped Linear control, isolated PRs, executable evidence, immutable AI review, and merge verification without recovery or terminal-issue hard-codes.

gate:release-certification: Skill validation, semantic dry runs, repository policy tests, hosted certification, and an immutable AI-reviewed PR prove the reusable delivery control
